commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 54%, while the market favors Egypt at 40%. The largest single gap appears on the Australia win probability, where the model exceeds the sportsbook consensus by 27 percentage points. This inverted-favorite pattern might reflect market-available information on recent form, injuries, or lineup changes that the model's Elo foundation cannot capture. The dashboard flags this divergence as a signal worthy of scrutiny rather than evidence that either source has miscalibrated.
